turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good afternoon. I'm calling about my biopsy report. It was supposed to be ready today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Good afternoon. I understand this must be an anxious wait. Your name please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Santosh ji, biopsy reports are handled directly by our pathology and histopathology teams. I don't have access to report status from here, and I wouldn't want to speculate on something as sensitive as a biopsy.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Can you at least find out if it's ready?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand — this is important. The right people to confirm this are our pathology staff. Let me connect you to them immediately so they can give you an accurate update.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Connecting you now — please hold for our staff.
